items.author: @kellerjordan0
items.text: Modded-NanoGPT optimization result #18: @zhanpeng_zhou has achieved a step count of 3225 with a preconditioned Muon variant called PMuon. This non-SOTA result is notable because it doesn't use the other SOTA-track techniques like update clamping and contra-muon.

items.summary: Modded-NanoGPT optimization result #18: @zhanpeng_zhou has achieved a step count of 3225 with a preconditioned Muon variant called PMuon. This non-SOTA result is notable because it doesn't use the other SOTA-track techniques like update clamping and contra-muon.

items.author: @maximelabonne
items.text: Turns out you never really needed µP, you just needed to scale the embedding learning rate by model width. I'm no nanoGPT speedrunner, but isn't it something people stumbled into by using Muon for hidden layers + Adam for the rest?

items.summary: Turns out you never really needed µP, you just needed to scale the embedding learning rate by model width. I'm no nanoGPT speedrunner, but isn't it something people stumbled into by using Muon for hidden layers + Adam for the rest?

roundup.title: Agent Harnesses & Vertical Infra Take Center Stage
roundup.subtitle: vLLM加速、DeepSWE基准与MiMo性价比成AI工程焦点
headline: @emollick 指出当前harness下的AI系统在法律与数学任务上已远超以往认知，@jeremyphoward 则高亮小米MiMo v2.5在超长工具描述上下文下的极致性价比。
@vllm_project 连续发布EAGLE 3.1与Rust前端，分别带来长上下文接受长度翻倍与单进程5x预处理加速，@LangChain 同步推出Mission Control实现Kubernetes内自托管LangSmith。
@kimmonismus 发布DeepSWE agentic coding新基准，GPT-5.5登顶；@ArtificialAnlys 则以MiniCPM5-1B将亚20亿参数Pareto前沿推至新高。
@AnthropicAI 强调agent权限需随能力演进并通过沙箱实现，@hwchase17 再次重申trace数据对生产级agent迭代的黄金价值。

deepDives.title: vLLM EAGLE 3.1与Rust前端双升级
deepDives.summary: vLLM连续推出EAGLE 3.1推测解码与Rust前端，显著提升长上下文与预处理性能。

facts.text: EAGLE 3.1支持最长上下文接受长度提升至2倍，并原生支持vLLM与Kimi K2.6 draft model开源。
facts.quote: Up to 2× longer acceptance length in long-context. Native vLLM support. Open-source Kimi K2.6 EAGLE 3.1 draft model.

facts.text: Rust前端正式合并入vLLM主线，在预处理重负载场景下单进程性能提升约5倍。
facts.quote: ~5x in a single process on preprocess-heavy workload.

bullish.text: 生产环境长上下文推理加速利器

deepDives.title: DeepSWE基准发布，GPT-5.5登顶
deepDives.summary: DeepSWE成为新的agentic coding基准，真实区分模型能力。

facts.text: DeepSWE新基准下GPT-5.5排名第一，显著优于此前模型。
facts.quote: the new DeepSWE benchmark shows that GPT-5.5 is now ranked number one

bullets.text: 小米MiMo v2.5 API价格永久降至原价1%，支持统一上下文定价。
bullets.quote: MiMo-V2.5 Series API pricing is now permanently reduced — by up to 99% compared to previous pricing.

bullets.text: MiniCPM5-1B在1B参数下得分17.9，输出token减少约31倍。
bullets.quote: scoring 17.9 with just 1B parameters... ~31x fewer output tokens.

bullets.text: physics-intern harness将Gemini 3.1 Pro从17.7提升至31.4，超越GPT-5.5 Pro。
bullets.quote: It gets models like Gemini 3.1 Pro to go from 17.7 -> 31.4, thus beating GPT 5.5 Pro.

bullets.text: W&B MCP Server已吸引1K+用户与40K+ tool calls。
bullets.quote: Preview already saw 1K+ users, 40K+ tool calls, and 45 enterprises

topTweets.text: EAGLE 3.1与Rust前端双发，长上下文与预处理性能大幅提升
topTweets.whyItMatters: 生产级推理加速直接落地

topTweets.author: @jeremyphoward
topTweets.text: MiMo v2.5在超长工具描述上下文下性价比极高
topTweets.whyItMatters: 低成本高性能模型选项

topTweets.author: @emollick
topTweets.text: 当前harness下AI系统真实能力已超预期

topTweets.author: @_lewtun
topTweets.text: physics-intern harness让Gemini 3.1 Pro大幅超越GPT-5.5 Pro

takeaways: 关注vLLM EAGLE 3.1与Rust前端，可立即获得长上下文推理加速收益。
DeepSWE与physics-intern等专用harness已成为评估与提升agent能力的标准工具。
MiMo v2.5等低价高性能模型适合大规模agent部署，需重新评估成本曲线。
trace数据与权限沙箱设计是生产级agent落地的核心工程实践。
